message:
feat(oracle): add phantom subregion detection to region tree oracle (bd-2e1ji)

Add reverse validation in check(): verify every entry in a parent's
subregions set exists in the regions map. Catches stale references
injected via on_subregion_add() without a corresponding on_region_create().
New PhantomSubregion violation variant with 3 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
